privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section_intro_text: SwissUnihockey Stats ('we', 'us', 'our') respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you use this website and how we use it.
privacy.section_data_text: We collect only the minimum data necessary to operate the service:
privacy.data_item_logs: Server access logs (IP address, browser type, pages visited) – retained for up to 30 days for security and debugging purposes.
privacy.data_item_contact: Contact form submissions (name, email address, message) – used solely to reply to your enquiry.
privacy.data_item_cookies: A session cookie for the admin area and your language/theme preference stored in localStorage – no tracking cookies.
privacy.section_usage_text: We use collected data exclusively to:
privacy.usage_item_improve: Analyse anonymous usage patterns to improve the platform.
privacy.section_cookies_text: This site uses a single session cookie required for the admin area. Your theme preference is stored in your browser's localStorage. No third-party tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.section_storage_text: All data is stored on servers located in Switzerland / the EU. Contact form messages are deleted after your enquiry is resolved. Server logs are purged after 30 days.
privacy.section_third_party_text: Statistics data is fetched from the official Swiss Unihockey API (swissunihockey.ch). No data is shared with advertising networks or other third parties.
privacy.section_rights_text: Under Swiss data protection law (nDSG) and GDPR you have the right to:
privacy.rights_item_access: Request a copy of any personal data we hold about you.
privacy.rights_item_delete: Request deletion of your personal data.
privacy.rights_item_object: Object to or restrict processing of your data.
privacy.section_contact_text: For any privacy-related questions, please use our
privacy.section_changes_text: We may update this policy from time to time. The date at the top of this page reflects the latest revision. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

errors.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It may have been moved or deleted.
errors.server_error_desc: Sorry! Something went wrong. Our team has been notified and is working on a fix.
errors.notify_team: If the problem persists, please contact us with this error ID.

game.no_events: No event data available for this game.
game.no_roster: No roster data available. Run an events index job to fetch lineups.
game.pos_legend: G = Goalie · D = Defender · C = Centre · A = Winger
